metadata.warning: Artifacts were generated from representative sample findings in the repository and do not confirm live tenant scans.

summary.statusSemantics: Control states describe documentation-first sample evidence and must not be treated as proof of live scanning depth.

controls.notes: Automated readiness and data hygiene checks cover the six defined scan domains, but business-owned content remediation remains outside automation.
Sensitivity label usage and coverage are inventoried, but taxonomy approval and legal interpretation remain compliance-led activities.
Guest account review is excluded in this tier, so permission model coverage is limited to internal sharing posture.
SharePoint Advanced Management readiness is sampled in this tier and should be expanded before production attestation.
License planning is assessed at a summary level in this tier and should be supplemented with periodic business justification review.
